description: Resolution -> colour budget + technique guidance (the 'scale hierarchy' in rules/03 / rules/01). Used by tools/lint_sprite.py to auto-derive --budget from canvas size when none is given, and as generation defaults for /pixel-new & /pixel-palette. Pick the FIRST tier whose `max_side` >= the sprite's longer side.

tiers.note: icon / tiny: silhouette + flat fills, no AA; imply motion with sub-pixel colour, not shape
small character: minimal AA at most, hue-shifted 3-5 step ramps
medium: selective hand-placed AA on key curves
large: full ramps, purposeful dithering ok
